prompt: Vertical portrait 9:16 high-resolution atlas world map for a Deadlands-inspired Weird West RPG setting. Terrain type: single_continent. Draw one immense fictional continent on aged sepia parchment in frontier cartography style, with ghost-rock mine claims, rail lines, frontier towns, haunted canyons, sacred native spirit lands, undead outlaw danger zones, and ghost-rock steam-tech survey markings. The continent spans many climates and biomes: sun-baked desert badlands, red mesas, prairie grasslands, snowy mountain chains, pine forests, bayous, salt flats, volcanic ghost-rock fields, stormy coasts, and flooded western maze channels. Coastline must be realistic and complex with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, river deltas, fjords, barrier islands, and varied landforms. Include irregular small offshore islands in uneven clusters, all different shapes and sizes. Large detailed atlas composition, ornate compass rose and scale decorations allowed, no readable labels, no legible text, no logos, no modern satellite style.
